entries.note:
Shipped the remaining BRO-54 follow-ups — Saved Stacks (SUPP-251) and Bookmarked Guides (SUPP-252) — plus a P0 hotfix to auth.config.js default that was silently breaking admin auth on every deploy.

Saved Stacks: new userStacks Convex table, collision-resistant slug generator, public /stacks/{slug} view via Vercel rewrite, Save button injected into Stack Analyzer export bar, dashboard panel with Open/Delete actions. Bookmarked Guides: new userBookmarks table, bookmarks-sync.js module mirroring the favorites pattern, bookmark button in the share-bar of 19 regenerated guides, dashboard panel that joins purchase-status from guidePurchases (owned/pending/checkout/failed/not_purchased).

Major debugging wins: caught that auth.config.js default-DEV + swap-deploy-revert script was intermittently shipping DEV domain to prod (silent admin-query failure), flipped the committed default to PROD and made the deploy script idempotent. Caught a second Vercel cleanUrls gotcha where rewrite destinations ending in .html silently 404 — fix is drop the .html. Fixed a pre-existing window-vs-document event-listener bug in favorites-sync.js and dashboard.js that prevented auth:signed-in from ever firing. All three gotchas now documented in CLAUDE.md.

Deployed Convex functions to production and merged to main.
